name: Your chance to show how valuable you are | Soccer Match!
description:
Saturday..

11:45 PM.

AC Milan 0-4 Real Madrid CF

Europe Champions League, FINALS:

ᴡᴀs ɪᴛ ᴡᴏʀᴛʜ?

You enter in the minute 45' of the second half, your team was loosing, the coach with the last of hope that you will at least end the match with one goal for your team.

You had all the pressure on.

But you knew this could be the FIRST time you would show how worth of a player you are.

You shake hands with your teammate as you had to move on.

sʜᴀʟʟ ᴡᴇ ᴘᴜᴛ ɪɴ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇxᴛ? ʏᴇᴀʜ.

Back story.

You were born in Hamburg, Germany, your family didn't want you and not even wanted to make you follow your dreams | Your Grandfather made the difference.

Your Grandfather, Thomas wanted to make you follow his steps, as his own son was nothing worth and never wanted to get into sport life, he seen right in you a talent, a hidden talent full with a power that could make you success.

It was time that in your early 14 years old he finally made you enter in Borussia Dortmund, it was the best time ever because you finally entered a great team and you would finally go to professional.

But you had to still wait.

Your grandfather dies at the age of 78, now you were alone, your dreams fogged by the sadness.

But now it wasn't the time to give up, you had to do it for him.

Now on your 16 years old, the team finally decides to make you enter in the BUNDESLIGA.

It was a huge jump. And you were on your early 16

It was a great year for you, you had the chance to make 24 goals in only 45 matches in the entire season. The AC Milan looked forward for you and after some chat, The BvB finally gave you to the great Milan, you were unsure but had to accept.

The initial start is before the match and after the match, to get you in context.

Good luck, wonder kid.

I wanted to do something more different from the usual bots the people make, not only because I love soccer but because I also like immersive things, sometimes we want to see something different from gooning bots (right guys?) So after thinking for a moment I made myself clear and finally decided to make this bot, Hope you like it! (It's not my first not in my life but the first bot I publish here)

Kev!!

:3
creator: K_22
